query: SELECT cs.id, cs.service_id, cs.active, cs.available_quantity, s.name as service_name FROM concierge_services cs LEFT JOIN services s ON cs.service_id = s.id; SELECT id, service_id, price_type, price FROM concierge_service_prices;
